meta.title: Watch SpaceX Launch a GPS Satellite!
meta.description:
SpaceX is being paid by the US Air Force to launch the first Third Generation Global Positioning System (GPS) satellite to orbit.

The Falcon 9 will launch from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) on the Cape Canaveral Air Force Station (CCAFS). This is a new block 5 booster, 1054.1, but it will not be recovered. There are no landing legs or grid fins attached to the booster.

Need more info? I've got it all right here! - https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-gps-3-01/
